from manim import *

class UnitCircle(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Unit Circle and Trigonometric Projections", font_size=36, color=WHITE)
        title.to_edge(UP, buff=0.4)
        self.play(Write(title))

        circle = Circle(radius=1.0, color=WHITE, fill_opacity=0.0, stroke_width=4)
        self.play(Create(circle))

        axes = Axes(
            x_range=[-1.5, 1.5, 1], y_range=[-1.5, 1.5, 1],
            x_length=6, y_length=6,
            axis_config={"color": GRAY, "include_numbers": True},
        )
        labels = axes.get_axis_labels(x_label="x", y_label="y")
        self.play(Create(axes), Write(labels))

        dot = Dot(axes.c2p(1, 0), color=YELLOW)
        self.play(Create(dot))

        angle = 0
        sine_line = Line(axes.c2p(0, 0), axes.c2p(0, 0), color=BLUE, stroke_width=2)
        cosine_line = Line(axes.c2p(0, 0), axes.c2p(0, 0), color=RED, stroke_width=2)
        self.play(Create(sine_line), Create(cosine_line))

        self.play(dot.animate.move_to(axes.c2p(np.cos(angle), np.sin(angle))), 
                  sine_line.animate.become(Line(axes.c2p(0, 0), axes.c2p(0, np.sin(angle)), color=BLUE, stroke_width=2)),
                  cosine_line.animate.become(Line(axes.c2p(0, 0), axes.c2p(np.cos(angle), 0), color=RED, stroke_width=2)))

        for angle in np.linspace(0, 2 * PI, 100):
            self.play(dot.animate.move_to(axes.c2p(np.cos(angle), np.sin(angle))), 
                      sine_line.animate.become(Line(axes.c2p(0, 0), axes.c2p(0, np.sin(angle)), color=BLUE, stroke_width=2)),
                      cosine_line.animate.become(Line(axes.c2p(0, 0), axes.c2p(np.cos(angle), 0), color=RED, stroke_width=2)),
                      run_time=0.05)

        sine_wave = axes.plot(lambda x: np.sin(x), color=BLUE, x_range=[-PI, PI])
        cosine_wave = axes.plot(lambda x: np.cos(x), color=RED, x_range=[-PI, PI])
        self.play(Create(sine_wave), Create(cosine_wave))

        self.wait(2)
        self.play(*[FadeOut(m) for m in self.mobjects])
